title: Modern frontend performance starter pack
content: Three sources we keep coming back to when a UI starts feeling slow: measuring real bottlenecks, keeping bundles understandable, and avoiding layout surprises before they hit production.
contentHtml:
Three sources we keep coming back to when a UI starts feeling slow:

  • measuring real bottlenecks
  • keeping bundles understandable
  • avoiding layout surprises before they hit production
summary: A curated frontend reading list that feels closer to how teams actually share reference material.

title: Backend debugging stack for busy teams
content: The links we pass around most during incident reviews usually share the same theme: tighten the feedback loop between metrics, traces, and the code paths people are actually touching.
